statements.__comment: Link PublicIP to Device based on CrowdstrikeHost external_ip
statements.query: MATCH (p:PublicIP), (host:CrowdstrikeHost)<-[:OBSERVED_AS]-(d:Device) WHERE p.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG AND host.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG AND d.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG AND host.external_ip = p.ip_address MERGE (p)-[r:POINTS_TO]->(d) ON CREATE SET r.firstseen = timestamp() SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG
